label: industry-peer-rule

mutation_summary: Added 'Industry-peer rule' covering competitor/platform/tool names absent from the brief, even widely-known industry peers to a brief-named incumbent. Provides escape-hatch phrasing: 'the other major [category] platforms,' '[incumbent]-class tools,' 'the dominant [category] incumbents.' Explicitly applies to all sections (Stage 2 concepts, Stage 4 SEO, Stage 5 competitor saturation, Stage 7 dialogue, Stage 8 earned-media targets).

13 sections; LexisNexis mentioned 26x (brief-verbatim); 2 template citations; clean. No industry-peer leaks.

verdict_reasoning: Industry-peer rule closes the c6 failure mode that surfaced during adversarial validation. 3/3 brief-06 outputs clean under Haiku grep verification. No regression on any other criterion. Champion advances from iter-2-anti-fab-stage4 to iter-3-industry-peer-rule.
